allow: Bash(mysql -uroot -pmines -h127.0.0.1 sea -e "SELECT LEFT\(submitDate, 10\) as date_str, COUNT\(*\) as cnt, CAST\(SUM\(CASE WHEN reportNo = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) AS UNSIGNED\) as null_cnt FROM project WHERE submitDate >= '' AND submitDate < '' GROUP BY LEFT\(submitDate, 10\) HAVING null_cnt > 0 AND LEFT\(submitDate, 10\) = '2024-05-07'")
